reason:
Agent was unable to retrieve GitHub username due to invalid GitHub account credentials (401 error)
  Bugs found:
    - The GitHub account connection returned "401 Bad credentials" when the agent attempted to fetch the authenticated user. The connected GitHub account showed as "connected 3 minutes ago" and marked as "Protected", but the GitHub API rejected the token with a 401 error. The response did not include a GitHub username as expected.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents including "QA-20260427-051323-5tuo" with idle status
Clicked on "QA-20260427-051323-5tuo" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded successfully
Verified agent status — Status was "idle" which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was sent successfully and agent status changed to "working"
Granted GitHub account access when "Account Access Request" card appeared — Clicked "Allow Access (1)" to grant permission to the checked GitHub account
Multiple API permission dialogs appeared during processing — Clicked "Allow Once" for each GitHub API request dialog (approximately 3-4 times)
Waited for agent response — Agent completed processing within 3m 51s (within the 4-minute limit)

Verified response content — Response received but it does NOT include GitHub username. Instead, agent reported: "I can't retrieve your GitHub username — the connected GitHub account (ID `9cf5f149-961a-4a7c-836a-40661eb7bb63`) is returning 401 Bad credentials from GET /user through the proxy. The token attached to that account is invalid or revoked."
bugs: The GitHub account connection returned "401 Bad credentials" when the agent attempted to fetch the authenticated user. The connected GitHub account showed as "connected 3 minutes ago" and marked as "Protected", but the GitHub API rejected the token with a 401 error. The response did not include a GitHub username as expected.
